source.authority: Revenue Administration of Türkiye and SUNAT Peru
source.scope: Official-source-backed calendar-year 2026 annual income-tax schedules for Türkiye and Peru.

TR.notes: General and wage annual tariff schedules at 15%, 20%, 27%, 35% and 40% on caller-confirmed taxable income. Exemptions, deductions, withholding and category-specific income remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 general and wage annual tariffs on caller-confirmed taxable income.

PE.notes: Annual work and qualifying foreign-income scale at 8%, 14%, 17%, 20% and 30% using the 2026 PEN 5,500 UIT on caller-confirmed net taxable income.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 annual work-income tax on caller-confirmed net taxable work and qualifying foreign income.
